summary: Phase 3 (Voice on Web) testing complete. Backend: 9/9 pytest passed including real Whisper STT call on ffmpeg-generated WAV via emergentintegrations OpenAISpeechToText (model=whisper-1). Frontend: all VoiceControls data-testids render, settings panel opens with mode/tts/voice select/preview, localStorage persistence verified (sheldon-mode, sheldon-tts) across reload, mic permission denial gracefully shows 'Mic blocked' status without crashing.

issues: When open, the absolute-positioned settings panel (320px wide, anchored bottom:80 right:12 of composer) slightly overlaps the 'Send' button. Cosmetic — interaction still works since panel has a close (X). Could nudge horizontal offset or shift z-index/origin if main agent wants a cleaner look.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py STT route correctly handles: missing EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (500), >25MB (413), <500B (graceful empty), missing filename (synthesizes voice.{webm|mp4|wav} from content-type), budget-exceeded LLM error (429 with a Sheldon-flavoured message). Logic is tight.
VoiceControls.jsx cleans up MediaStream tracks + AudioContext + RAF on unmount and on stop — good. The cleanupStreams() closes audioCtx inside a try/catch, safe.
VAD threshold (avg byte-bin > 12, silence_ms 1200) is reasonable; document constants if they need tuning per-device.
Speak-reply useEffect dedupes via lastSpokenRef so the same reply is not re-spoken on re-render — nice.
Spacebar push-to-talk is wired only when mode==='push' and skipped when an INPUT/TEXTAREA/contentEditable is focused. Correct.

Minor: settings panel uses position:absolute relative to the composer div (composer now has class 'relative'). Verified panel renders inside viewport; on narrow viewports it falls back to maxWidth: calc(100vw - 24px).

Minor: continuous-mode auto-restart calls startRecording() via setTimeout — fine, but rapid restart cycles could create transient AudioContexts. Already mitigated by cleanupStreams() before each handleStop.
server.py is now ~745 lines; voice route is small but Phase 3 is a natural moment to split into /app/backend/routers/{chat,voice,cocktails,...}.py.
seed_data_creation: None new. Used ffmpeg-generated /tmp/test.wav (1s 440Hz sine, 32KB) for real Whisper transcription call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 voice is solid. /api/voice/transcribe verified end-to-end against real Whisper (whisper-1) via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY — sine-wave WAV returns 200 with text:'' (silence-detected by Whisper) which is the correct behaviour for pure-tone input. To test with spoken audio, generate via espeak/festival or any short voice WAV. Frontend VoiceControls component renders all expected data-testids (mic-button, voice-settings-toggle, stop-tts, voice-settings-panel, mode-push, mode-continuous, tts-toggle, voice-select, voice-preview, mic-status). localStorage keys: sheldon-mode (push|continuous), sheldon-tts (on|off), sheldon-voice (voice name). ffmpeg was installed in this iteration (apt install ffmpeg) — should persist for next runs.
rca of the issue: No outstanding issues. All Phase 3 functionality working as specified.
